folio.label: 178v
folio.l: Now herkenetú , if ©ow liketú for to heere
But first I ©ow byseke , in this matere
Thougú I be ordre , telle nat theise thynges
Be it of Popes , Em¹oås or kynges
After here ages , as men writen fynde
But telle he~ some bifore , & some bihynde
As it now cometú , vn to my remembraunce
Haue me excused , of myn ignoraunce
